author: jochembrouwer
content:
Hi all, I believe that EIP-8037 + EIP-7778 have a bug where we are able to produce blocks which are much larger than the expected max block size. PR to [fix](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11908), it includes a test to [reproduce](https://github.com/jochem-brouwer/execution-specs/blob/6bb0b6f5bc79d2f7d267e8190ef34ecdad3577fd/tests/amsterdam/eip7778_block_gas_accounting_without_refunds/test_calldata_floor_block_gap.py#L82)
Currently we are able to produce blocks 16x the max size we expect due to EIP-7623 flooring formula.
CC <@968526635735326741>, <@792404665068158998>

content: Good catch! Happy to approve the EIP PR, after it is moved form draft. <@755913785620824175>, are we still on time to update the specs?
